text:
The department shall:

(1) administer and enforce this chapter; and

(2) provide for hearings on the request of a person aggrieved by an act of the department under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.021 — Department Powers and Duties; Rules

The department shall:

    (1) administer and enforce this chapter; and

    (2) provide for hearings on the request of a person aggrieved by an act of the department under this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: administer and enforce this chapter; and
provide for hearings on the request of a person aggrieved by an act of the department under this chapter.
